title: Wait of The World
description: A mod that makes it possible to use magic using rituals written in chalk
body:
The *Wait of The World* mod adds many new items and game mechanics including chalk and rune inscription.

Using **wretched chalk** on the blocks places runes that can be used for new rituals.
There are several runes present in the mod:



**Eye Rune**

**Sun Rune**

**Moon Rune**

**Wind Rune**

**Transformation Rune**

**Arrows Rune**
